prompt: A minimalist Scandinavian-designed dashboard for monitoring renewable energy grids, featuring clean typography, muted earth tones, and simple geometric data visualizations
prompt_refined: A minimalist Scandinavian-designed digital dashboard for monitoring renewable energy grids. The central display features a large, clean panel for real-time energy flow, complemented by smaller, square data widgets neatly arranged to its left and right, showcasing metrics like production and consumption. All textual elements utilize crisp, sans-serif typography. Data visualizations are simple and geometric, including line graphs, bar charts, and circular progress indicators. The entire interface is rendered in a cohesive palette of muted earth tones, specifically desaturated greens, soft grays, and warm beiges.
objects: Smaller, square data widgets (left of central panel)
Smaller, square data widgets (right of central panel)
